vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening (4 settlements + 4 roads), board fit from empty_baseline (residual 0.79px). meta player_colors CORRECT (Sheat=RED, ThePhantom=BLACK). Note both v8 and v19 have multiset {ORE,WHEAT,WOOD} matching ThePhantom's grant, but v8=ThePhantom's grant and v19=Sheat's non-grant; per-player self-check disambiguates. ThePhantom (BLACK) settlements v8=[1,7,18] and v13=[3,11,12] (roads v8-v9, v13-v15). Sheat (RED) settlements v0=[0,3,4] and v19=[5,6,16] (roads v0-v5, v19-v23). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES per player: ThePhantom {ORE,WHEAT,WOOD} equals exactly v8 (ORE4+WHE3+WOO8) and NOT v13 (BRI10+BRI5+SHE8={BRICK,BRICK,SHEEP}); Sheat {BRICK,BRICK,SHEEP} equals exactly v0 (SHE11+BRI10+BRI3) and NOT v19 (ORE6+WOO5+WHE9={ORE,WOOD,WHEAT}). Roads verified via 2.8x crop (v0-v5 and v13-v15).
